description: These details are used on your invoice and PDF and are securely stored in your account.
logoFormats: Allowed formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP — max 5 MB. Large images are automatically resized to max 400×200 px.

messages.fileTooLarge: File is larger than 5 MB and cannot be loaded.
messages.logoResized: Logo has been resized but is still quite large. Consider using a simpler image.

messages.checkoutCancelled: Checkout cancelled. Your current plan remains active.
